title: <div><tt>| Course Systems      | PDF kits, Online classes         | Pay-what-you
content:
| Course Systems | PDF kits, Online classes | Pay-what-you-can, academic licensing |
| Archives & Studies | Anthologies, Myth Indexes | Grants, research libraries, collectors |
| Modular Templates | Creative prompts, logic decks | Freelancers, consultants, systems thinkers |
| Studio Services | Branding, storytelling, media | Through `::ULTI.TOOL.MEDIA` |

---

### III. | COMMERCIAL ECOSYSTEM NODES

| NODE/ENTITY | FUNCTION |
|----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| `::AJP.MECA.ARTS` | Parent company, IP holder, narrative container |
| `::ULTI.TOOL.MEDIA` | Business-facing marketing, design, consulting hub |
| `::ET4L` | Multimedia label: music, video, cross-disciplinary |
| `::AMP.LABS.MEDIA` | Public-facing educational content, ed-tech publishing |
